title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PayU Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PayU Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
PayU Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PayU Digital Technologies:
PayU Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
